title: Sustainability Triple Bottom Line
html: Stub. Standard environmental/social/economic three-axis sustainability scorecard. Captured in Yahir's wetland water treatment study notes applied to a constructed wetland (likely Jackson Frazier). Yahir's spontaneous gentrification-flip aside (property-value pro becomes class-displacement con) shows the same systems-thinking habit that surfaces later in Austin and AI search takes.
